notes: Example values are illustrative and exist only to demonstrate the rendering contract.
Indicators are calculated from returned rows only; warmup values remain omitted.
Chart engine: lightweight-charts 5.2.0, vendored in the skill package under Apache-2.0 with TradingView attribution.
MACD uses 12,26,9 with histogram = DIF - DEA. KDJ uses 9,3,3.
source_disclosure.risk_note: This visualization is not investment advice.
